# Peri Peri Grill House

> 100% halal peri peri chicken, marinated overnight and flame-grilled to order. Two locations in New York: Brooklyn (Bed-Stuy) and Bethpage (Long Island).

## About

Peri Peri Grill House is a halal restaurant specializing in flame-grilled peri peri chicken. Our chicken is marinated overnight in a special blend of peri peri spices featuring African Bird's Eye chili, then grilled to order over an open flame. We offer seven heat levels from Plain-ish (no heat) to Extra Hot.

Peri peri cooking originated in Southeast Africa when Portuguese settlers combined the African Bird's Eye chili pepper with garlic, citrus, and oil to create what is now known as peri peri sauce.

## Locations

### Brooklyn (Bed-Stuy)
- Address: 235 Malcolm X Blvd, Brooklyn, NY 11233
- Phone: (917) 966-8614
- Hours: Tue-Sat 12 PM - 10 PM, Sun 12 PM - 9 PM, Mon Closed
- Neighborhood: Bed-Stuy, near Utica Ave A/C station

### Bethpage (Long Island)
- Address: 629 Hicksville Rd, Bethpage, NY 11714
- Phone: (516) 261-9953
- Hours: Mon-Wed 11 AM - 10 PM, Thu-Sat 11 AM - 12 AM, Sun 12 PM - 12 AM
- Serves: Bethpage, Hicksville, Farmingdale, Massapequa, Nassau County

## Menu Highlights

### Peri Peri Chicken
- Wings: $11.99
- 1/4 Chicken (Breast & Wing): $8.99
- 1/4 Chicken (Leg & Thigh): $7.99
- 1/2 Chicken: $16.29
- Whole Chicken: $39.99
- Boneless Chicken Breast w/ Rice & Salad: $13.79
- Crispy Chicken Tenders: $11.99

### Burgers & Sandwiches
- Chicken Breast Sandwich: $13.99
- Peri Classic Smash Burger: $8.50
- Peri Oklahoma Smash Burger: $9.00
- Falafel Burger: $13.99
- Fried Chicken Sandwich: $11.99

### Wraps
- Chicken Breast Wrap: $11.99
- Falafel Wrap: $11.99
- Crispy Tender Wrap: $11.99

### Family Meals
- Whole Chicken w/ 4 Sides: $53.99
- 2 Whole Chickens w/ 6 Sides: $95.99

### Milkshakes
- Dubai Milkshake (pistachio, Knafeh): $13.29
- Mango Milkshake: $11.99
- Biscoff Milkshake: $11.99
- Nutella Milkshake: $11.99

## Heat Levels (Peri Scale)
1. Plain-ish — no spice, all flavor
2. Lemon & Herb — citrusy, zero heat
3. Garlic — savory, roasted garlic
4. Medium — balanced peri peri kick
5. Hot — serious African Bird's Eye heat
6. Very Hot — intense fire
7. Extra Hot — maximum heat for spice warriors

## Key Facts
- 100% Halal certified
- Chicken marinated overnight (minimum 12 hours)
- Flame-grilled to order (never baked or fried)
- Dine-in, takeout, and delivery available
- Delivery via UberEats and DoorDash
- Catering available for events
